title: SaaS metrics platform
description: Analytics dashboard with auth, RBAC, and near-real-time event ingestion for product squads.
challenges: Efficient aggregation modeling, per-tenant caching, and queues for write spikes without hurting reads.

title: Enterprise design system
description: Accessible component library with theme tokens and living documentation for distributed teams.
challenges: Stable prop contracts across versions, aggressive tree-shaking, and consistent dark/light themes.

title: Recurring billing API
description: Subscription microservice with idempotent webhooks and automated financial reconciliation.
challenges: Exactly-once webhook semantics, reconciliation against gateway drift, and trace-based observability.

title: Headless e-commerce
description: Fast storefront with instant search and a headless CMS for agile merchandising.
challenges: ISR with selective invalidation, dynamic SEO per category, and search index synced with stock.

title: Realtime chat
description: Rooms with presence, paginated history, and secure attachments for internal teams.
challenges: Socket backpressure, message ordering on flaky networks, and retention policies.

title: Serverless ETL pipeline
description: Partitioned CSV/JSON ingestion with a DLQ and per-run metrics.
challenges: Predictable cold starts, warehouse rate limits, and cost per GB under control.
